articles.title: Delhi moves from 'Achiever' to 'Exemplar' category in LEADS 2025
articles.summary: Delhi moves from 'Achiever' to 'Exemplar' category in LEADS 2025. Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta on Saturday said that the national capital has secured a place in the highest 'Exemplar' category in the Logistics Ease Across Different States (LEADS) 2025 Index, marking a major jump from its earlier 'Achiever' status.
